reason: CROSS-REFERENCE ERROR IN FIX FILE: fix_1.7_slicing.tex line 61 references Definition~\ref{def:Tmunu-dist} (the distributional energy-momentum tensor definition) where it should reference Definition~\ref{def:timelike-worldline} (the worldline definition). The sentence discusses completeness of the worldline (I = R), which is stated in def:timelike-worldline, not def:Tmunu-dist. The lecA1.tex HEAD (line 623) has the CORRECT reference. If merging the fix file, this line must NOT be taken from the fix file.
